# Lasyly

> Lasyly is a real-time social platform for sports bettors. It combines data-backed prop analytics, Discord-style betting rooms, live scores across 10+ sports, curated sports news, and a tipster marketplace — all in one dark-themed, mobile-first web app.

## What Lasyly Does

Lasyly solves the fragmented sports betting experience. Instead of juggling multiple apps for analytics, community, scores, and picks, bettors get everything in one place — for free.

Think of it as PrizePicks analytics + Discord-style rooms + a tipster marketplace.

## Who It's For

- Recreational sports bettors who want data-backed insights before placing props
- Serious handicappers looking for advanced analytics (hit rates, matchup grades, correlations, line movement)
- Tipsters who want to monetize their picks by selling them to followers
- Sports fans who want a social space to discuss games, share betslips, and track live scores

## Core Features

- Betting Rooms: Public, private, and premium tipster rooms with real-time chat and betslip sharing
- Prop Analytics: Player prop cards with hit rates (L5/L10/L15/L20), matchup grades (A-F), confidence scores, trend arrows, streak dots, correlations, line movement, and AI writeups
- Bet Tracker: Log picks, track win rate, ROI, net profit, and discover which signals work best for you
- Live Scores: Real-time scores for Soccer, NBA, NFL, Tennis, NHL, MLB, F1, UFC, Golf, and Cricket
- Sports News: Curated feed from ESPN covering Football, NBA, NFL, UFC, Tennis, F1, and Cricket
- Wallet & Marketplace: Stripe-powered credits system where tipsters sell picks (85/15 revenue split)
- Dashboard: Personal analytics hub with win rate, sport breakdowns, and funds activity
- Social: Follow bettors, share betslips with reactions, leaderboards, and profile pages

## Sports Covered

- NBA (basketball-reference.com data: box scores, player stats, team defense ratings)
- Tennis (tennisabstract.com data: serve stats, return stats, surface splits)
- Football/Soccer (fbref.com data: player stats, standings for top 5 European leagues)
- NFL, NHL, MLB, F1, UFC, Golf, Cricket (live scores via ESPN)

## How Analytics Work

All prop lines and analytics are computed from real scraped historical data — no paid odds feeds. Scrapers run automatically via GitHub Actions. Hit rates, matchup grades, confidence scores, and correlations are all derived from actual player performance history.

## Business Model

- Tipster marketplace: 15% platform fee on premium pick sales (tipsters keep 85%)
- Wallet top-ups via Stripe for purchasing picks
- Future: Premium tiers, room subscriptions, sponsored content

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion 12
- Supabase (Postgres + Row Level Security + Realtime)
- Stripe (Checkout Sessions + Webhooks)
- Python scrapers (Scrapling library) on GitHub Actions
- Radix UI, Lucide Icons, Vitest

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://lasyly.me): Landing page with product overview and signup
- [Features](https://lasyly.me/features): Detailed breakdown of platform capabilities
- [Tipsters](https://lasyly.me/tipsters): Information about the tipster marketplace
- [Blog](https://lasyly.me/blog): Sports betting insights and platform updates
- [Scores](https://lasyly.me/scores): Live scores across 10+ sports
- [News](https://lasyly.me/news): Curated sports news feed (Lasyly Daily)
- [Analysis](https://lasyly.me/analysis): Player prop analytics and research tools
- [Rooms](https://lasyly.me/rooms): Browse and join betting community rooms
- [Explore](https://lasyly.me/explore): Discover rooms, tipsters, and trending content
- [Dashboard](https://lasyly.me/dashboard): Personal betting performance analytics
- [Bets](https://lasyly.me/bets): Bet tracker and pick logging
- [Wallet](https://lasyly.me/wallet): Credits, top-ups, and transaction history

- [Signup](https://lasyly.me/signup): Create a new account
